name: white-theme-web
roast: white-theme-web crashes harder than my faith in humanity — 6 out of 10 attacks broke it. Ship it to prod, I dare you.
topFix: Add try-catch blocks with specific error types around all API handlers, especially /api/submit and /api/process

name: express
roast: express didn't just fail gracefully — it failed spectacularly, dramatically, and repeatedly. 7 attacks, 7 ways to ruin someone's day.
topFix: Add try-catch blocks with specific error types around all API handlers, especially /api/data and /api/admin

name: express
roast: express is a security audit's worst nightmare — 3 security checks failed. Anyone with a browser and 10 minutes could ruin your day.
topFix: Add express-rate-limit: const limiter = rateLimit({ windowMs: 15*60*1000, max: 100 }); app.use(limiter)
